mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and discount rates for future earnings, directly increasing equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer demand, triggering immediate risk-off selling in equities over the following week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite the rising unemployment signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real personal spending and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand recovery, driving sustained equity appreciation over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive momentum in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns, with out-of-sample R-squared below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production expansion above the 2012 baseline indicates robust manufacturing capacity utilization, supporting corporate earnings growth and positive equity returns over one month.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases yield negative 20-day forward returns in > 55% of observations during the specified recovery regime.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating monthly inflation erodes real corporate margins and prompts expectations of tighter monetary policy, causing immediate equity drawdowns over the next five trading days.
failure_condition: Inflation spikes above the threshold consistently coincide with positive 5-day SPX returns, contradicting the margin compression mechanism.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms a strengthening labor market that boosts consumer confidence and drives quarterly equity gains.
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising PAYEMS and falling UNRATE fails to generate positive 60-day returns, with a negative Rank IC over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth reflects stronger aggregate economic activity and corporate revenue expansion, directly translating to positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth shows zero or negative correlation with 20-day forward returns across all tested samples.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production dropping below the 95.0 index threshold signals severe manufacturing contraction and supply chain bottlenecks, triggering immediate risk-off equity selling over one week.
failure_condition: SPX delivers positive 5-day returns in > 60% of instances when INDPRO crosses below the 95.0 threshold.
